Crabapple Tree on east side of trail near Exacto factory on Interurban Trail. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.
On the north side of the Ozaukee Interurban trail.  Discovered these while commuting by bike to work a couple of years ago. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
